# hcloudimage_snapshot (Data Source)

Looks up an existing Hetzner Cloud snapshot by ID or label selector, so you can reference images not created in this state.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    hcloudimage = {
      source  = "nivis-project/hcloudimage"
      version = "~> 0.1"
    }
  }
}

provider "hcloudimage" {}

# Look up a snapshot by label selector, choosing the newest match.
data "hcloudimage_snapshot" "base" {
  with_selector = "os=nixos"
  most_recent   = true
}

# Or look up a specific snapshot by ID.
data "hcloudimage_snapshot" "by_id" {
  id = 12345678
}

output "base_snapshot_architecture" {
  value = data.hcloudimage_snapshot.base.architecture
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (Number) Look up by image ID. Mutually exclusive with `with_selector`.
- `most_recent` (Boolean) When a selector matches multiple snapshots, pick the newest instead of erroring.
- `with_selector` (String) Hetzner label selector (`key=value`). Must resolve to exactly one snapshot unless `most_recent` is set.

### Read-Only

- `architecture` (String) Guest architecture (`x86` or `arm`).
- `created` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `description` (String) Snapshot description.
- `labels` (Map of String) Snapshot labels.
- `name` (String) Snapshot name.
